title: Day 39 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - ふじさんの　とざんは　けいけんが　なくても、できますか。= Even if you are not experienced, can you climb Mt. Fuji?

Sentence 2 - けいけんしゃじゃなくても、だいじょうぶですよ。= It's okay even if you don't have experience.

Sentence 3 - そんなに　たかくなくても、いい　くつは　ありますよ。= They don't have to be expensive, but you need good shoes.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
